overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a player driving a black sports car through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk, parking near a ramen shop, then proceeding on foot through a purple-lit underpass. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and transitions from open urban driving to enclosed pedestrian walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: major city intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: car turns right at intersection, navigating around crosswalk
passes through intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: driving the black sports car through city streets, navigating intersections and turning right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red crossing the street ahead of the vehicle

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with white racing stripes, ego vehicle
white striped pedestrian crosswalk on wet asphalt
large digital billboard displaying '08' in bright white neon
tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows
traffic signal showing red light suspended over intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a black sports car navigating a wet, neon-lit city intersection at dusk. The car turns right through the crosswalks while a pedestrian crosses ahead, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards under a darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with gas station and ramen shop

events.description: driving from open street into more enclosed commercial plaza area
car pulls up and parks next to the ramen shop entrance

agents.ego_description: driving into the plaza area and parking the car next to the ramen shop

entered.detail: orange and yellow gas station canopy with 'TURBO' signage
wooden sign with 'RAMEN SHOP' text and Japanese characters
large circular ventilation ducts on building facade
green vehicle parked near the ramen shop

segments.scene_description: The car drives from the open intersection into a semi-enclosed urban plaza featuring a gas station and commercial buildings. The vehicle slows and parks beside a ramen shop with distinctive ventilation shafts, transitioning from active driving to a stationary state in a quieter plaza area.

events.description: player exits the parked vehicle and transitions to on-foot perspective
approaching and entering the covered underpass with purple lighting

agents.ego_description: exiting the black sports car and walking toward the underpass entrance

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance with purple neon lights visible inside
red and white striped concrete block barrier

segments.scene_description: The player exits the parked vehicle and proceeds on foot across the concrete plaza. The camera moves away from the car toward a dark underpass entrance illuminated by purple neon lights, leaving the gas station and ramen shop behind as the environment transitions from vehicle-based to pedestrian exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with purple neon lighting

events.description: entering the fully covered underpass with dominant purple neon ambient lighting
passing by a pedestrian in red shirt walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit underpass toward the distant exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and blue pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and purple neon tube lights
long purple fluorescent lights running length of the tunnel ceiling
rough concrete walls with graffiti and mounted digital screens
illuminated vending machines with advertisements on the left wall
bright exit at the far end of the tunnel showing the street beyond

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a long, narrow underpass illuminated by vibrant purple neon tubes along the ceiling. The concrete corridor features vending machines and digital posters on the walls. The character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction while approaching the bright exit at the far end, where the city street is visible beyond the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed drive through a neon-lit metropolis to a slow pedestrian walk through a subterranean corridor. It begins by trailing a black sports car as it navigates a wet city intersection beneath towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. As the vehicle leaves the open road, it glides into a semi-enclosed urban plaza and comes to a halt beside a ramen shop and gas station. The camera then shifts from the car to the player on foot, moving away from the parked vehicle and toward the mouth of a dark underpass. Finally, the scene transitions into a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by vibrant purple neon tubes, passing vending machines and digital posters before approaching the bright light of the city street at the far exit.
